description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the node:12-alpine Docker image, include the external template .gitlab-ci-template.yml from the gitlab-org/frontend/untamper-my-lockfile project, and set default runner tags to gitlab-org. Define a hidden job template .build_teampage in the build stage that runs `apk add --update --no-cache curl bash gzip`, then `bash ./build.sh`, lists the `public/` directory with `ls public/`, and stores the `public` folder as an artifact. Add a `build_teampage` job extending this template and configure it to run on any branch except the default branch (`if: $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH != $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH`). Add a `pages` job also extending the template, set to run only on the default branch (`if: $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH`), and publish the `public` artifact as GitLab Pages. Configure the workflow to trigger pipelines for merge requests or when the commit is on the default branch.
